description: Detailed follow-up email sent after a call where the contact asked for more information for management review. Covers sales channel breakdown (Amazon 65%, brick-and-mortar 25%, eCommerce 10%), MAP compliance, 600+ brand portfolio, $300K initial order, and quarterly $1M reorder potential. Requires contact name.
template:
Hi [Name],

I appreciate your time on our call and your willingness to take this discussion to your management. As requested, here's a detailed breakdown of our sales strategy, the value we bring, and why working with us can be a significant opportunity for your brand.

Our Sales Channels & Multichannel Strategy:

We operate a high-volume, multi-channel distribution model designed to drive brand growth while maintaining pricing integrity. Our sales breakdown is as follows:
- Amazon (65%) – This remains a key platform for us due to its extensive customer base, robust advertising capabilities, and global reach. We use a highly controlled approach, ensuring brand integrity, adherence to MAP policies, and preventing unauthorized resellers from damaging the brand's value.
- Brick-and-Mortar Stores (25%) – We have partnerships with over 250+ retail locations nationwide, placing your products directly in front of in-store customers.
- E-Commerce Website (10%) – Our online store caters to a loyal customer base, contributing to steady demand and controlled brand representation.

This diversified model ensures that we don't rely on just one channel, making our distribution sustainable and data-driven for maximum efficiency.

Why Amazon is a Key Driver:

We understand concerns about third-party sellers on Amazon, but our controlled and strategic approach ensures that brands retain their premium status:
- MAP Compliance & Brand Protection – We strictly adhere to MAP policies, ensuring price stability and brand positioning.
- Marketing Investment – We allocate a handsome amount of budget in advertising spend, driving targeted traffic to listings through sponsored ads, SEO, and enhanced brand content.
- Unauthorized Seller Control – We help brands combat gray-market sellers, protecting margins and preventing pricing disruptions.
- Advanced Analytics & Demand Forecasting – We use real-time data to optimize sales velocity, ensuring efficient inventory turnover.

The Kind of Business We Can Provide:

- Upfront Payments & Large Orders – We are ready to place initial orders up to $300K, fully paid before shipment.
- Consistent Reordering – Our top-performing brands receive quarterly orders exceeding $1M, ensuring steady growth.
- Strong Logistics & Fulfillment – Our distribution network moves over 500,000+ units monthly, ensuring fast sell-through rates and minimal warehousing risk.
- Scalable Partnership – We expand brand presence while keeping tight control over distribution, ensuring sustainable and profitable growth.

Brands We Work With:

We currently manage over 600+ brands, including Logitech, Danner, Leapers, Sierra Natural Science, and Starwest Botanicals. These partnerships showcase our ability to handle premium brands with precision, compliance, and strong sales performance.

Next Steps:

I'd love to continue this discussion and explore how we can create a high-value collaboration that benefits your brand. Let me know what additional details your management may need, and we can set up a time to discuss further.

Looking forward to your thoughts!

I hope you are doing well.

At [CompanyName] Distributors, we use a balanced go-to-market strategy that integrates:

- Brick-and-Mortar Stores: Around 35% of our sales come from physical retail locations, where customers can engage directly with products and build trust in the brand.
- E-Commerce Platform: Our dedicated website offers convenience for customers who prefer to shop online, ensuring your products are accessible to a broader audience.
- Online Marketplaces: We also leverage different online marketplaces such as Facebook Marketplace, Amazon, etc. to further increase brand exposure. While it is a key channel for us, we are committed to maintaining your brand's integrity by strictly adhering to Minimum Advertised Price (MAP) policies and ensuring that there are no conflicts with other sellers.

We believe that our comprehensive sales strategy will benefit your brand by expanding its reach across various channels, without disrupting your current operations. Our approach is designed to complement your existing sales strategies, helping us to reach up to $500K in monthly orders.

How We Can Help You Grow Monthly Orders:

- With our buying power and established network of over 70,000 customers, we aim to boost your product visibility and drive consistent demand.
- Our advanced marketing strategies, including targeted Google and Meta ads, are designed to bring steady traffic and conversions across all channels.
- On Amazon, we use proven listing optimization techniques and ad campaigns that typically lead to a 20-30% increase in sales within the first three months of partnership.
- Offline, we ensure regular restocking in stores to meet demand, building stronger connections with repeat customers.

By combining these efforts, our goal is to increase monthly orders while maintaining your brand's integrity and growth objectives.

I'd love to hear your thoughts and explore how we can collaborate to create a successful partnership.
